subcategory : "Instances"

# ovh_cloud_image

Use this data source to retrieve information about an image available in a public cloud project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "ovh_cloud_image" "image" {
  service_name = <Public cloud project id>
  id           = "<image id>"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Image ID
- `service_name` (String) Service name of the resource representing the id of the cloud project

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation date of the image
- `min_disk` (Number) Minimum root disk size (GB) required to boot from this image
- `min_ram` (Number) Minimum RAM (MB) required to boot from this image
- `name` (String) Image name
- `region` (String) Region where the image is offered
- `size` (Number) Size of the image (bytes)
- `status` (String) Availability status of the image
- `updated_at` (String) Last update date of the image
- `visibility` (String) Visibility scope of the image
